svg.aria-label: Figure 4.7 Interview Panel and Sequential Workflow Design
svg.text: Figure 4.7  Interview Panel and Sequential Workflow Design
PHASE 1  External Interview Panel Setup (HR Portal)
active_changed_at  timestamp used by interviewer polling
Waiting for HR to click Start&
No personal passwords � Shared panel code � 24-hour link expiry � Only registered panel members may join
PHASE 3  Sequential Active-Candidate Workflow (Core Design Rule)
Only ONE candidate is active per job panel at any time
HR marks board shows who scored what + pending evaluators
Interviewer portal auto-refreshes when active_application_id changes
PHASE 4  Screening Guard & Final Selection (HR Portal)
No premature "completed" after one scorer � Marks table shows pending evaluator names � Highest interview_average wins selection
